{{Quote|I've got a load of high priority spares for the Brodsport Mining Corporation. Rel Farley's the assistant manager there... tell him the first beer's on me.|[[Kyle Katarn]], under the alias of Dan Drexel|<ref name="SFTE" />}}
'''Rel Farley''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the assistant manager of the [[Brodsport Mining Corporation]] in [[Trid]], on [[Danuta]]. He was also a sympathizer for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="SFTE" />

Preparing for his [[mission to Danuta]] on the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'', [[Kyle Katarn]] was told to mention Farley's name when checked by the customs. Indeed, approaching the planet, [[X-Ray 291]] demanded his business, and Katarn claimed that his ship was bringing spares for Brodsport, mentioning also Farley, adding a friendly remark for him. Katarn was not told more about Farley, but supposedly he was to confirm the ship's business. After some time, presumably checking with Brodsport, X-Ray allowed the ''Crow'' to land.<ref name="SFTE" />
